body_text:
25:21 â September 15, 2025
Update to the User Management Part
We substantively edited and reorganized the User Management Part. The Part now includes procedures for managing access to all applications in the User Management application, not just those with special permissions. This includes when an application access requires approval by a second User Management Security Officer in User Management, and if the application (or specific application functionality), requires a 2-step security token. We also added procedures for managing administrative rights for other security officers, accessing User Management reports that are sent by secure mail, and other recent improvements.
